zh_CN: 试试 F1 打开用户手册
Ctrl+S 快速保存当前文档
左侧边栏可拖拽调整宽度
支持 Markdown 与 LaTeX 双格式
知识库可关联本地文档，增强 AI 回复
公式识别支持手写与截图

可视化视图可导出为图片
设置中可切换亮色/暗色/跟随系统
支持从剪贴板直接粘贴图片
大纲可折叠、拖拽调整顺序
写作时可随时召唤 AI 补全
校对工具可检测语法与用词
数据解析工具支持 CSV、Excel
RAG 检索会优先使用已关联知识库
新文档可从模板创建
支持多标签页同时编辑
导出时可选 PDF、Word 等格式
Ctrl+F 全文查找，支持正则
段落可单独请求 AI 润色
今日宜写文档，忌拖延。
写不动的时候，试试让 AI 先起个头。
代码块里的注释也会被尊重。
表格支持从 CSV 粘贴一键生成
长文档建议先列大纲再展开
公式用 LaTeX 写，渲染交给 MetaDoc
图表生成支持柱状图、折线图等
Agent 引擎可选 ReAct、Plan-Execute 等
本地模型与 API 可同时配置
调试面板可查看启动耗时
窗口池让拖出新窗口更快
按需加载，启动更轻。
双栏编辑时左右可独立滚动
支持 Mermaid、PlantUML 等图表语法
引用块、代码块都有快捷键
AI 补全可设置延迟触发，省 token
知识库支持 PDF、Word、TXT 等多种格式
公式识别结果可直接插入为 LaTeX
多窗口间可拖拽 Tab 迁移文档
导出 PDF 时可选页边距与字体
主题色可跟随系统或自定义
侧边栏工作区可添加多个文件夹
全文替换支持区分大小写与全词
段落优化会保留你的核心表述
Agent 可选用不同引擎，风格不同
RAG 检索结果会高亮在原文中
数据表格可交给 Agent 做简单分析
写论文记得先建知识库再问 Agent
LaTeX 编译失败时控制台会标出行号
Monaco 与 Vditor 可随时切换
纯文本模式适合不想渲染的场景
附件解析可把 PDF 里的图提出来
校对不仅改错别字，也顺句子
可视化视图里流程图可导出 SVG
试试对一段话右键「AI 分析」
新文档欢迎页有快捷入口
Markdown 表格可 CSV 粘贴生成
写不动就点一下 Logo 摇一摇。
据说多写文档能涨经验值。

en_US: Press F1 to open the user manual
Ctrl+S saves the current document
Drag the left sidebar to resize
Markdown and LaTeX are both supported
Link a knowledge base to improve AI answers
Formula recognition supports handwriting and screenshots
Agent supports multi-turn chat and tools
Visualize view can export as images
Switch light/dark/system in Settings
Paste images directly from clipboard
Outline can fold and reorder by drag
Summon AI completion while writing
Proofread tool checks grammar and wording
Data tool supports CSV and Excel
RAG uses your linked knowledge first
New documents can start from templates
Multiple tabs for parallel editing
Export to PDF, Word, and more
Ctrl+F to find, regex supported
Request AI polish for a single paragraph
Today: write docs; avoid procrastination.
Stuck? Let AI write the first line.
Code block comments are respected.
Paste CSV to create a table in one go
Long docs: outline first, then expand
Write LaTeX; MetaDoc renders it
Charts: bar, line, and more
Agent engines: ReAct, Plan-Execute, etc.
Use local models and API together
Debug panel shows startup timings
Window pool makes new windows snappy
Load on demand, start light.
Dual-pane editor: each side scrolls independently
Mermaid, PlantUML, and more diagram syntax
Blockquotes and code blocks have shortcuts
AI completion can delay to save tokens
Knowledge base: PDF, Word, TXT, and more
Formula recognition inserts LaTeX directly
Drag tabs between windows to move docs
Export PDF with margins and fonts
Theme: system, light, dark, or custom
Workspace sidebar: add multiple folders
Find-replace: case-sensitive, whole word
Section optimizer keeps your voice
Agent engines: different styles
RAG highlights matches in the source
Hand tables to Agent for quick analysis
For papers: build a knowledge base first
LaTeX errors show line numbers in console
Switch between Monaco and Vditor anytime
Plain-text mode when you want no render
Attachment parser extracts images from PDF
Proofread fixes typos and flow
Flowcharts in Visualize export as SVG
Right-click a paragraph → AI Analysis
New-doc welcome page has shortcuts
Paste CSV to create Markdown tables
Stuck? Click the logo and shake it off.
Rumor: writing docs levels you up.
This tip will go away; F1 manual won’t.
